testcase.classname: Finding Doctors Near You on Practo
testcase.name: Find doctors by clicking Find Doctors Near You and display their names and experience

failure.message: invalid session id Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [1843d20b35f9a1744b0b4bb3a4fd1c8d, findElements {using=css selector, value=div.listing-doctor-card}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.178, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.165 (4b989da09e1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\2479722\AppData\Lo...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:57602}, goog:processID: 15964, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:57602/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.178, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 1843d20b35f9a1744b0b4bb3a4fd1c8d

testcase.system-out: Given I am on the Practo home page..........................................passed When I click on "Find Doctors Near You" card on the home page...............passed Then the doctors listing page should load...................................passed When I search for "Dermatologist" in the search box and submit..............passed Then the doctor results page should load with doctor cards..................passed When I collect the top 10 doctor details....................................failed Then I display the names and experience of all collected doctors............skipped

testcase.name: Find hospitals that are Open 24x7, have Parking and Rating above 3.5

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //*[@id='c-omni-container']/div/div[1]/div[2]/div[2]/div[1]' (tried for 20 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval)
